releaseNotes:
## 1.5.5

### In-App Update
- Auto-check update dari remote `version.json` setiap app dibuka
- Download APK otomatis via DownloadManager
- Install via FileProvider + REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES
- Update dialog dengan release notes

### Shared Element Transition
- Hero animation album art dari mini-player (36dp circle) ke NowPlaying (110dp rounded)
- Morphing scale, position, dan corner radius (18dp → 24dp)
- Reverse animation pas swipe down / back

### UI Improvements
- Header reorder: search kiri | ianplayer tengah | theme toggle kanan
- Animasi spring minibar & controls pas pertama play
- Rounded checkbox di Create/Add Playlist dialog
- Edit/delete icon playlist pakai adaptive color

### Hidden Gems
- Swipe kanan di mini-bar Listening to → volume control (slider + icon volume)
- Swipe atas di media controls → cycle adaptive color background dari palette album art
- Swipe bawah → clear background

### Backend
- **Stream API**: primary JioSaavn (saavn.dev), fallback YTMusic (Piped)
- **Lyric API**: lrcmux.dev fallback setelah LRCLIB, sebelum SomeRandomAPI & lyrics.ovh
- **PlaybackService**: notifikasi MediaSession + notification channel

### Technical
- 10 files modified, 557 insertions, 195 deletions
- Palette color extraction dari album art (7 warna: Vibrant, Muted, dll)
- Play logic crosscheck: REPEAT_MODE_ONE/ALL/OFF handled manual via listener
